notes: Collected from each hotel's official Dining page via WebSearch result digests.

restaurants.raw_address: 15 Ngô Quyền, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Believed to be the oldest continually operating restaurant in Vietnam (since 1901). Reopened after refurbishment. Classic high-end French gastronomy.

restaurants.raw_address: 15 Ngô Quyền, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Refined modern Vietnamese inside Sofitel Metropole; refurbished 2023.

restaurants.raw_address: 15 Ngô Quyền, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Bar-lounge-restaurant; oysters, lobster, wagyu. Habanos Lounge (cigars).

restaurants.raw_address: 65F, 54 Liễu Giai, Cống Vị, Ba Đình, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: 65F rooftop with 360° panorama of Hanoi. Smart casual dress code. The reference example in tagging-guide.md for `date` + view.

restaurants.raw_address: 8 Đỗ Đức Dục, Mễ Trì, Nam Từ Liêm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Voted best French fine dining in Vietnam; largest open kitchen in Hanoi. Repeatedly listed in MICHELIN Guide.

restaurants.raw_address: 8 Đỗ Đức Dục, Mễ Trì, Nam Từ Liêm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Chef Akira Back's global concept; modern Japanese with Korean inflection.

restaurants.raw_address: 8 Đỗ Đức Dục, Mễ Trì, Nam Từ Liêm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Premium Cantonese with dim sum and seafood; well-regarded in Hanoi for Chinese business banquets.

restaurants.raw_address: 11 Lê Phụng Hiểu, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: 1920s renaissance-inspired oyster bar by day, cocktail bar by night. Asia's 50 Best Bars 2024 Top 81.
